# External ADK Integrations Registry

Source type: `external`

External source:

- Upstream: `https://adk.dev/integrations/`

This registry covers ADK's public tools and integrations catalog. External
entries must point to web URLs.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `integrations-catalog.yaml` | ADK public tools and integrations from `adk.dev/integrations` |
| `*.md` | General descriptions only; do not duplicate structured records |
